item.title: Common cold 2018
item.description: Source: TW The Common Cold: A Review of OTC Options Blesson O. George, PharmD Candidate 2019 St. John’s University, College of Pharmacy & Health Sciences Queens, New York Joseph V. Etzel, PharmD Associate Dean for Student Affairs Associate Clinical Professor St. John’s University, College of Pharmacy & Health Sciences Queens, New York Emily M. Ambizas, PharmD, MPH, BCGP Associate Clinical Professor St. John’s University, College of Pharmacy & Health Sciences
